pageContext.name: Animal Crossing: New Horizons Villager
pageContext.description: New Shokugan flocked doll collection featuring the popular villagers from the Animal Crossing: New Horizons video game series. Each character stands approximately 2.2' tall. The soft and fuzzy texture make these already cute characters even more adorable! Each comes in a window box. This set contains all 7 characters in special packaging.  Add to your collection today!
